description: Risk tier change on Fund F4 (Harrington Private Capital, HIGH tier) — should gather audit history, re-screen entity, and retrieve what changed via RAG

description: UBO ownership structure change on Fund F2 (Meridian) crossing threshold — pull UBO chain first, then audit history, then RAG for recent context
